content.title: Welcome to Arena Triumph
content.body: Gear up, battle bosses, and rise through the tiers. Let's tour the basics.

content.title: The Game Loop
content.body: Obtain gear through mini-games, manage your inventory, scout bosses, then battle them in the Arena.

content.title: Daily Rewards
content.body: Claim rewards each day. Check back regularly for bonuses.

content.title: Affinity Reference
content.body: Learn which affinities are strong or weak against others. Use this to plan your gear and battles.

content.title: Navigation
content.body: Battle: fight bosses. Obtain Gear: play mini-games for new gear. Manage Inventory: equip and organize. Inspect: view your loadout.
